notes: v0.16.33 — Phase 6/9: SLIPSTREAM node. New MatchMode.SLIPSTREAM — pseudo-3D tunnel runner. Your ship locks to the rim of a circular tunnel; rings of obstacles rush in from the vanishing point and you rotate left/right with A/D or arrows to thread through the gap in each one. 3 hits = node failed (-1 life); survive 30s = node cleared. Difficulty scales cadence, gap width, ring speed, and how hard the gap chases your position — BRUTAL barely lets you read the ring before it arrives. Windows only.
